title: Department Manager Vacancy at Durian Furniture - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Department Manager Vacancy at Durian Furniture - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
We at Durian Furniture are looking for an experienced Department Manager based out of Agra. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Durian Furniture:
Durian Furniture is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Assist in recruiting, onboarding, and performance management of staff
• Coordinate with the supply chain team for timely stock delivery
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Prepare daily sales reports and share insights with management
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Manage store operations to ensure smooth daily functioning

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
• 10-15 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in KPI Management
• Proficiency in Visual Merchandising
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Category Management

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 20 LPA - 40 LPA per annum

Location: Agra, Uttar Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Durian Furniture!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: Post Graduate Diploma in relevant field
